articles.title_en: Russian Foreign Ministry: the situation in the Strait of Hormuz and the blockade of Iran also affect Russia
articles.lead_en: As the deputy head of the Russian diplomatic service, Alexander Pankin, explained, due to high prices, demand decreases, the cost of fuel, fertilizers and “many other things” increases.
articles.title_raw: МИД РФ: ситуация в Ормузском проливе и блокада Ирана влияют и на Россию
articles.lead_raw: Как пояснил замглавы российского дипведомства Александр Панкин, из-за высоких цен снижается спрос, повышается стоимость топлива, удобрений и "многих других вещей"

articles.title_en: Russian Foreign Ministry: Russia always assumes the worst-case scenario for US sanctions
articles.lead_en: Deputy Head of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Alexander Pankin thus commented on Washington’s suspension of restrictions against Russian oil
articles.title_raw: МИД РФ: Россия всегда исходит из худшего сценария по санкциям США
articles.lead_raw: Замглавы министерства иностранных дел Александр Панкин таким образом прокомментировал приостановку Вашингтоном рестрикций против российской нефти

articles.title_en: Foreign Ministry: Russia is ready to consider the possibility of new oil supplies to Cuba
articles.lead_en: Deputy Foreign Minister of the Russian Federation Alexander Pankin added that Moscow may consider other measures to support the republic
articles.title_raw: МИД: Россия готова рассмотреть возможность новых поставок нефти на Кубу
articles.lead_raw: Замминистра иностранных дел РФ Александр Панкин добавил, что Москва может рассмотреть и другие меры поддержки республики

articles.title_en: Russia to Cut Kazakh Oil Transit to Germany
articles.lead_en: The German subsidiary of Russia's state-owned oil company Rosneft told German regulators that the Russian Energy Ministry had ordered the suspension.

articles.title_en: Ukraine resumes oil flow via Druzhba pipeline – Hungary

articles.title_en: Ukraine Repairs Druzhba Pipeline, Clearing Way for Russian Oil Flows to Europe
articles.lead_en: The pipeline, which carries crude to Hungary and Slovakia, has been at the center of a monthslong diplomatic standoff.
articles.title_raw: Ukraine Repairs Druzhba Pipeline, Clearing Way for Russian Oil Flows to Europe

articles.title_en: Zelensky says Ukraine has completed repairs on Druzhba pipeline, which carries Russian oil to Europe
articles.lead_en: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said on April 21 that specialists had completed repairs on a section of the Druzhba pipeline that Kyiv says was damaged in a Russian military strike.

articles.title_en: Russia Forced to Slash Oil Production After Ukrainian Strikes – Reuters
articles.lead_en: The reduction, estimated between 300,000 and 400,000 barrels per day, comes as Ukraine ramps up its strike campaign against the energy and export infrastructure that accounts for roughly a quarter of Russia’s state revenue.
